name: Santander Bank ATM
description_short: Santander Bank ATM located inside CVS Store #11384 at 217 Broadway, New York. Offers 24-hour cash access as part of Santander's 2000+ ATM network across the Northeast.
description_long:
Santander Bank is a major regional bank serving the Northeast with a substantial network of branches and ATMs. This specific location is an ATM housed within a CVS Pharmacy store at 217 Broadway in lower Manhattan, providing customers convenient access to cash withdrawal and banking services at a retail location. The ATM operates 24 hours daily, 7 days a week, allowing customers to access their funds outside traditional banking hours. Santander Bank's broader service offerings include checking accounts, money market savings accounts, online and mobile banking, business banking, and investment services through affiliated entities.

This ATM location specifically provides basic cash access functionality as part of Santander's expanded network strategy of placing ATMs in high-traffic retail locations like CVS pharmacies. The bank emphasizes convenience and accessibility, marketing its 2000+ ATM network across the Northeast as enabling customers to "bank anywhere, anytime." The location is positioned within a Financial Center area near the Broadway-Fulton Street district, with nearby branch offices and additional ATMs within walking distance. Santander encourages digital banking through their Mobile Banking App (rated 4.7/5 stars with 379k ratings) and Online Banking enrollment for account management.

What distinguishes this ATM is its location within a major retail pharmacy chain (CVS), making it accessible during extended retail hours and in a high-foot-traffic consumer area. The 24-hour availability sets it apart from branch-based services, which have traditional banking hours. The ATM is part of a larger Santander ecosystem that includes comprehensive financial services, though this specific location provides only ATM functionality. Santander Bank is FDIC-insured and maintains membership in FINRA and SIPC through its investment services division.

This is straightforward ATM access with no hidden complexity. The main limitation is that this location provides only ATM services—complex banking needs require visiting a branch office. ATM access may be affected by CVS store holidays or special closures, creating a potential availability caveat. For basic cash withdrawal, this location offers reliable 24/7 access within a convenient retail setting.
pros: 24-hour daily availability, 7 days a week with no time restrictions
Located inside CVS Store #11384 for convenient retail access in high-traffic area
Part of Santander's 2000+ ATM network across the Northeast for expanded access
FDIC-insured institution backing the ATM and parent bank
Nearby branch office at 222 Broadway (0.1 miles away) for in-person banking needs
Two additional nearby ATMs within walking distance for backup access
Integration with mobile banking app (4.7/5 rating) for account management
cons: ATM access may be affected by CVS store holidays or special closures beyond standard banking hours
This location offers ATM-only services; complex banking needs require visiting a physical branch
Limited to Santander customer accounts; non-customers may face out-of-network fees
No in-person customer service available at ATM location; phone support only via (877) 768-2265
best_for: Santander Bank customers needing 24/7 emergency cash access in lower Manhattan
CVS pharmacy shoppers who are Santander customers wanting convenient ATM access during shopping trips
Residents and workers in the Broadway-Fulton Street financial district requiring after-hours banking access
diagnosis: This ATM is best for existing Santander Bank customers in lower Manhattan who need reliable 24-hour cash access, particularly those near the CVS at 217 Broadway. The main caveat is that CVS store closures (holidays, special events) may affect ATM availability, and this location provides no in-person banking services beyond cash withdrawal.
services: Money market savings accounts (through parent bank)
Location finder for nearby branches and ATMs
